# MDLMeshBufferType.vertex

**Case**

The buffer contains per-vertex data for one or more vertex attributes of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMesh] object.

## Declaration

```swift
case vertex
```

## Constants

- **MDLMeshBufferType.index**: The buffer contains index data for a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh] object.
